title: astragalus supervisus
intro: Astragalus supervisus, also known as a type of Astragalus, is a plant species in the legume family that is widely used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of astragaloside, a saponin compound that is said to have immunomodulatory and anti-inflammatory effects. Astragalus supervisus is believed to have health benefits such as boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
